# PERF-100 positive: cobra.Command with many flag registrations in init
lang: go
file: PERF-100-vulnerable.go
---
package main

import (
	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
)

var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
	Use:   "myapp",
	Short: "My app",
	RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
		return runWithFlags(cmd, args)
	},
}

func init() {
	rootCmd.Flags().String("config", "", "config file path")
	rootCmd.Flags().String("log-level", "info", "log level")
	rootCmd.Flags().Bool("verbose", false, "verbose output")
	rootCmd.Flags().Int("retries", 3, "retry count")
	rootCmd.Flags().Duration("timeout", 30, "request timeout")
}

func runWithFlags(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
	return nil
}

func main() {
	_ = rootCmd.Execute()
}
